import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function PlayerCard({ player }) { return (
🇮🇳 {player.team}
{player.name}
≫ {player.role}
Matches
{player.matches}
Runs
{player.runs}
Average
{player.battingAvg}
Strike Rate
{player.strikeRate}
Highest Score
{player.highScore}*
Wickets
{player.wickets}
); } export default PlayerCard;
